data.title: In the past hour, a total of $182 million in positions were liquidated across the entire network, with $64.78 million liquidated in ETH alone.
data.description: Following the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision, major cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin (BTC) fell. Coinglass data shows that in the past hour, $182 million in positions were liquidated across the entire network, with $177 million in long positions and $5.1811 million in short positions. Specifically, $64.78 million in ETH and $63.64 million in BTC were liquidated.

data.title: The WLFI token unlocking governance proposal is now open for a 7-day voting period.
data.description: World Liberty Financial has initiated a governance proposal vote on token unlocking, involving 62,282,252,205 locked WLFI tokens. According to the proposal, if passed, these tokens will not enter the market for at least two years. The proposal indicates that up to 45.2 billion WLFI held by the founding team, advisors, and partners will be converted to a 2-year lock followed by a 3-year linear unlock, accompanied by the burning of up to approximately 4.5 billion tokens; approximately 17 billion locked tokens held by early supporters are proposed to be converted to a 2-year lock followed by a 2-year linear unlock. The voting period for this proposal is 7 days, with a quorum threshold of 1 billion WLFI.

data.title: Four dissenting votes deepened the rift within the Federal Reserve as Powell stepped down.
data.description: The Federal Reserve kept interest rates unchanged as expected, with 12 voting members participating. Four votes were against the change, the highest number since October 1992. According to the FOMC statement, Governor Milan voted against maintaining the rate and supported a 25 basis point cut; Cleveland Fed President Hamack, Minneapolis Fed President Kashkari, and Dallas Fed President Logan voted to maintain the rate but opposed retaining dovish language in the statement. The FOMC statement retained the word "further" in "considering the extent and timing of further adjustments to the target range for the federal funds rate." Investment banks expect the word "further" to be removed to weaken the indication of a rate cut. This meeting is likely Powell's last as Fed Chairman. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Treasury Yields Rise After Fed Holds Rates Steady
data.description: On April 30, U.S. Treasury yields increased following the Federal Reserve's decision to maintain interest rates. According to Jin10, the Fed's decision, marked by the most significant division since 1992, highlighted growing market concerns over inflation. The policy statement faced opposition from three officials who argued against signaling a tendency to lower rates. The two-year Treasury yield, which typically aligns with Fed rate expectations, rose by 7.8 basis points to 3.92%, the highest level since March 27.

data.title: Federal Reserve Describes Inflation as 'Elevated'
data.description: The Federal Reserve has characterized inflation as 'elevated,' a shift from its previous description of being 'slightly high.' According to Jin10, this change in language reflects the impact of global energy prices on inflationary pressures.

data.title: Federal Reserve Rate Decision Faces Most Dissent Since 1992
data.description: The Federal Reserve's recent interest rate decision and policy statement have encountered the highest level of dissent since October 1992. According to Odaily, this marks a significant moment in the history of the Federal Reserve's decision-making process.

data.title: Following the announcement of the Federal Reserve's interest rate policy, short-term US interest rate futures continue to reflect a low probability of a rate cut this year.
data.description: Following the Federal Reserve's decision to keep policy rates unchanged, short-term US interest rate futures continue to reflect a low probability of a rate cut this year. (Jinshi)

data.title: Senator Tillis Pushes for Clarity Act Progress Amid Banking Concerns
data.description: Senator Thom Tillis has announced that progress on the Clarity Act has alleviated several banking-related issues. According to NS3.AI, Tillis plans to encourage the Senate Banking Committee chair to advance the bill to markup. This step could pave the way for a hearing in mid-May, a necessary hurdle before the legislation can proceed to a full Senate vote. Stablecoin rewards continue to be a key point of negotiation, and any further delays could jeopardize the bill's progression through the remaining Senate schedule.

data.title: Putin Proposes Ceasefire in Ukraine During Victory Day Celebrations
data.description: Vladimir Putin has proposed a ceasefire in Ukraine during the Victory Day celebrations in May. According to NS3.AI, U.S. President Donald Trump responded positively to this proposal, indicating a potential shift in the ongoing conflict. The suggestion comes amid heightened tensions and international calls for peace in the region. The proposal and Trump's response could pave the way for diplomatic discussions aimed at resolving the conflict.

data.title: The probability of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates unchanged today is 100%.
data.description: According to CME's "FedWatch": The probability of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates unchanged today is 100%. The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged by June is 98.8%, with a 1.2% probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut. The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged by July is 94.6%, with a 5.4% probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut. The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged by September is 92.7%, with a 7.2% probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut and a 0.2% probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut.

data.title: Pump.fun launches the Charity Coins feature, allowing creators to donate their fees directly to charities.
data.description: Pump.fun has announced a partnership with Donate.gg to launch the Charity Coins feature, allowing projects to directly donate creator fees to charities. Users can set up to five charities as recipients through the Pump.fun app or website, with Donate.gg handling the crypto asset processing and donation transfers. This feature aims to reduce controversies, tax issues, and security risks associated with charitable narrative meme coins, and currently supports compliant donations to over 10,000 charities.

data.title: SpaceX's Starlink Sees Revenue Per User Drop by 18% Amid Quadrupled Customer Base
data.description: SpaceX's satellite internet service, Starlink, has experienced a significant decrease in revenue per user, dropping by 18% as the number of customers has quadrupled. According to Jin10, this development comes as Starlink continues to expand its reach and increase its user base globally. The growth in customer numbers highlights the increasing demand for satellite internet services, although it has impacted the average revenue generated from each user.

data.title: Federal Reserve Policy Statement and Powell's Press Conference Insights
data.description:
The Federal Reserve is expected to maintain interest rates unchanged, likely with an 11-1 vote, as Milan opposes. However, a unanimous decision is not ruled out if Milan withdraws his dissent. According to Jin10, the description of the labor market may be revised to reflect stability despite weak hiring activities. The statement might also reiterate or adjust the impact of the Middle East situation, previously described as "uncertain." Additionally, the phrase "further adjustments to the extent and timing of rates" might be softened by removing "further" to reduce dovish tendencies.

During the press conference, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell is expected to emphasize uncertainty, persistent inflation, and the need for patience. There is a hawkish risk, suggesting that rising energy prices could delay any easing policies. Powell may be questioned about discussions on rate hikes, but he is unlikely to provide clear signals on future actions. He is also expected to address whether he will remain a Federal Reserve governor until January 2028, as stepping down could enhance U.S. President Donald Trump's influence over the Federal Reserve.

data.title: Securitize and Computershare Introduce Onchain Equity Structure for U.S. Issuers
data.description: Securitize and Computershare have unveiled a new framework allowing U.S.-listed companies to place equity onchain. According to NS3.AI, this initiative involves the use of Issuer-Sponsored Tokens, which Securitize claims represent direct equity ownership instead of derivative wrappers. This development marks a significant step in Securitize's ongoing expansion into tokenized real-world assets, following their success in tokenizing over $4 billion.

data.title: Polymarket: Market discovery functionality is currently affected; the team is working to resolve it as quickly as possible.
data.description: Polymarket stated that the market discovery feature is currently affected. The team is aware of the issue and is working to resolve it as soon as possible. Some markets are displayed but cannot be clicked to view transaction details.

data.title: Polymarket Addresses Issues with Market Discovery Feature
data.description: Polymarket has announced that its market discovery feature is currently experiencing issues. According to Odaily, the team is aware of the problem and is working diligently to resolve it as soon as possible. Some markets are visible but users are unable to access detailed trading information.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI Hosts Developer Conference in San Francisco
data.description: OpenAI held its developer conference on September 29 in San Francisco. According to Jin10, the event gathered developers and industry leaders to discuss advancements in artificial intelligence and explore new opportunities for collaboration. The conference featured presentations on the latest AI technologies and provided a platform for networking among participants.

data.title: KAIO launches its native token, KAIO: Total supply is 10 billion tokens, with 37.5% allocated to community and liquidity incentives.
data.description: RWA tokenization protocol KAIO announced the launch of its native token KAIO on the X platform, and simultaneously established the KAIO Foundation as the off-chain governance and operation entity, responsible for protocol governance, treasury management, and ecosystem development, and collaborating with KAIO Labs to promote core infrastructure and product innovation. KAIO is positioned as an open infrastructure protocol for institutional real-world assets (RWA), committed to connecting traditional finance and DeFi, and building a compliant, auditable, and cross-chain tokenized asset network. Currently, the platform has listed 5 primary institutional funds, covering management institutions such as BlackRock, Brevan Howard, and Hamilton Lane, with a TVL of approximately $100 million, deployed on 10+ blockchain networks. In terms of token economics, the total supply of KAIO is 10 billion, of which community and liquidity incentives account for 37.5%, the largest allocation; team and early investor tokens have a lock-up and phased release mechanism, TGE is not released initially, and the foundation allocates 17% for long-term ecosystem development.

data.title: Bio Protocol Launches BioXP Upgrade with New Ignition Sale
data.description:
Bio Protocol has announced the launch of the latest upgrade to BioXP, now available for users. According to Foresight News, the Ignition sale is open to users holding USDC. Users can mint BioXP immediately by using BIO, which will determine share allocation in the event of oversubscription during the sale.

The Ignition sale will conclude in the following manner: if the target is not met, a full refund will be issued; if the target is reached, allocation will be based on USDC contributions. In cases of oversubscription, contributors pairing BioXP with USDC will receive priority allocation. Remaining USDC will be proportionally allocated or refunded, and if only USDC is subscribed, the system will account for the subscription as one BioXP.

data.title: Slovenia's Nationalist Leader Nears Political Comeback with Parliamentary Majority
data.description: Slovenia's nationalist leader, known for his alliance with U.S. President Donald Trump, is on the verge of a political resurgence. Bloomberg posted on X that recent voting results indicate he has secured a majority in the Slovenian parliament, paving the way for his return to power. This development marks a significant shift in the country's political landscape, reflecting growing support for nationalist policies. The leader's comeback could influence Slovenia's domestic and foreign policy directions, aligning more closely with Trump's administration. Observers are closely monitoring the situation as it unfolds, anticipating potential impacts on regional and international relations.
